member.name: T:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Countries.Data.IIpCountriesData
member.summary: Data interface for the . Contains flat (non-weighted) country code lists.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Countries.Data.IIpCountriesData.CountryCodesGeographicalAll
member.summary: All country codes ordered by geographical weighting descending, followed by remaining codes alphabetically.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Countries.Data.IIpCountriesData.CountryCodesPopulationAll
member.summary: All country codes ordered by population weighting descending, followed by remaining codes alphabetically.

member.name: T:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Countries.Data.IpCountriesData
member.summary: Element data for the . Contains flat (non-weighted) country code lists.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Countries.Data.IpCountriesData.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Countries.Data.IpCountriesData},FiftyOne.Pipeline.Core.FlowElements.IPipeline)
member.param: The pipeline this data belongs to.

member.name: T:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Countries.FlowElements.IpCountriesElement
member.summary:
A post-processing flow element that produces flat (non-weighted) country code lists by combining weighted results from the IPI engine with the full set of possible country codes loaded from a JSON file.
The results are stored in the element's own object, accessible via flowData.Get<IIpCountriesData>().
Must be added to the pipeline after the IPI engine.

member.param: The complete list of country codes, already sorted alphabetically.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Countries.FlowElements.IpCountriesElementBuilder.SetCountryCodesFile(System.String)
member.summary: Optionally set the path to a custom CountryCodes.json file. If not set, the embedded resource shipped with this package will be used.
member.param: Path to a JSON file containing an array of country code strings.
